list.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
list.author: Steve Jobs

list.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
list.author: Confucius

list.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
list.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

list.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
list.author: Aristotle

list.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
list.author: Lao Tzu

list.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
list.author: Nelson Mandela

list.text: People will forget what you said, but they will never forget how you made them feel.
list.author: Maya Angelou

list.text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
list.author: Albert Einstein

list.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
list.author: Peter Drucker

list.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
list.author: Winston Churchill

list.text: The future depends on what you do today.
list.author: Mahatma Gandhi

list.text: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
list.author: Henry Ford

list.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
list.author: Theodore Roosevelt

list.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
list.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

list.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
list.author: Aristotle

list.text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
list.author: Seneca

list.text: The quality of your life depends on the quality of your thoughts.
list.author: Marcus Aurelius

list.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
list.author: Benjamin Franklin

list.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
list.author: Confucius

list.text: Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much.
list.author: Helen Keller

list.text: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
list.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

list.text: Success is a few simple disciplines, practiced every day.
list.author: Jim Rohn

list.text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
list.author: Zig Ziglar

list.text: If you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together.
list.author: African proverb

list.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
list.author: Walt Disney

list.text: The secret of change is to focus all of your energy not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
list.author: Socrates

list.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
list.author: Leonardo da Vinci

list.text: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
list.author: Confucius

list.text: What we think, we become.
list.author: Buddha

list.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
list.author: Mark Twain

list.text: Success is no accident. It is hard work, perseverance, learning, sacrifice and love of what you are doing.
list.author: Pelé

list.text: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
list.author: Thomas Edison

list.text: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.
list.author: Dalai Lama

list.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
list.author: Steve Jobs

list.text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
list.author: Robert Collier

list.text: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
list.author: Aristotle
